utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah ! So ... so when are you getting married ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_So ... so when are you getting married ?

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: Oh I am not , I just like to try these on .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do the same thing .

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: I am just kidding . I am getting married July 25

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am just kidding too . I am getting married in December .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am just kidding too . I am getting married in December .

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: So when are you getting married ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , May 15 .

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: Oooh , it is getting close !

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: So uh , who your photographer ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Jeffrey

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: We met with him . Did he show you the photos of the nude wedding he did ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: The best man ? Wow !

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: I know ! I almost called off my wedding . Oh , who your band ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , my fiancee wants the Swing Kings .

utterances.speaker: Megan
utterances.text: Oh , you are so lucky . My fiancee wants the heavy metal band Carcass .

emotion_cause.span: 15_My fiancee wants the heavy metal band Carcass .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , is that spelled with a C or a K ? Oh my God ! It does not matter ; they are both great !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh you know what ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Now that you know what you want you should go to Kleinman and get it half off .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: This place is so overpriced .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So , does this come in another color or
